About: It is about occupying most of the board with pieces of their color.
ConsistsOf: It consists of 21 shapes in each of the four colors: blue, yellow, red, and green.
CreatedBy: It was created by the French biophysicist Bernard Tavitian.
HasA: It has many board and video game spinoffs.
It has 12 unique pieces in the Junior version.
It has 21 shapes in each of the four colors.
It has a smaller board of 14x14 in the Duo version.
It has a hexagonal board with a regular triangular grid in the Trigon version.
It has a larger board size of about 570 mm square in the Giant XL version.
It has a smaller board size of 14x14 in the Junior version.
It has a smaller board size of 14x14 in the Travel version.
It has a smaller board size of 14x14 in the Blokus To Go version.
It has four times the eleven possible polycubes of two, three, and four unit cubes in the 3D version.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by pieces being polyominoes.
It is characterized by pieces being polyiamonds in the Trigon version.
It is characterized by pieces being polycubes in the 3D version.
HeldIn: It was held in 2003 for the Australian Games Association Game of the Year.
It was held in 2002 for the Japan Boardgame Prize.
It was held in 2003 for the Mensa Select Award.
It was held in 2004 for the Major Fun Award.
It was held in 2004 for the Teacher's Choice Award.
It was held in 2006 for the International Gamers Award.
It was held in 2006 for the Sceau d'excellence Option consommateurs.
It was held in 2006 for the Major Fun Award.
It was held in 2008 for the Japan Boardgame Prize U-more Award.
IsA: It is an abstract strategy board game.
It is a clone video game.
It is a free desktop version.
It is a free, closed-source implementation.
KnownAs: It is known as Blokus Portable: Steambot Championship in its international release.
It is known as Blokus To Go! in its re-release.
It is known as Blokus XL in its re-release.
KnownFor: It is known for its abstract strategy gameplay.
It is known for its polyomino pieces.
It is known for its four player variations.
It is known for its two player variations.
It is known for its three player variations.
It is known for its numerous spinoffs.
It is known for its corner-to-corner contact rule.
It is known for its bonus points for playing all pieces.
It is known for its puzzle sheets in the Junior version.
It is known for its polycube pieces in the 3D version.
ManufacturedBy: It was manufactured by Sekkoïa and its distributors.
